mapper.insert: INSERT INTO animal (shelter_id, breed, age, health_status, is_adoptable, animal_photo) VALUES (#{shelterId},#{breed},#{age},#{healthStatus},#{isAdoptable},#{animalPhoto})
mapper.update:
UPDATE animal
breed = #{breed},
age = #{age},
health_status = #{healthStatus},
is_adoptable = #{isAdoptable},
animal_photo = #{animalPhoto}
WHERE animal_id = #{animalId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.animal_id as animalId, a.shelter_id as shelterId, s.name as shelterName, s.address as address, a.breed as breed, a.age as age, a.health_status as healthStatus, a.is_adoptable as isAdoptable, a.created_at as createdAt, a.animal_photo as animalPhoto FROM animal a LEFT JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s ON s.shelter_id = a.shelter_id WHERE is_adoptable != -1 LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.animal_id as animalId, a.shelter_id as shelterId, s.name as shelterName, s.address as address, a.breed as breed, a.age as age, a.health_status as healthStatus, a.is_adoptable as isAdoptable, a.created_at as createdAt, a.animal_photo as animalPhoto FROM animal a LEFT JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s ON s.shelter_id = a.shelter_id
a.is_adoptable != -1
AND a.breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breed}, '%')
AND s.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{area}, '%')
AND a.health_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{healthStatus}, '%')
AND a.is_adoptable = #{isAdoptable}
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shelterName}, '%')

SELECT a.animal_id as animalId, a.shelter_id as shelterId, s.name as shelterName, s.address as address, a.breed as breed, a.age as age, a.health_status as healthStatus, a.is_adoptable as isAdoptable, a.created_at as createdAt, a.animal_photo as animalPhoto from animal a LEFT JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s on s.shelter_id = a.shelter_id WHERE a.animal_id = #{animalId} AND a.is_adoptable != -1

SELECT a.animal_id as animalId, a.shelter_id as shelterId, s.name as shelterName, s.address as address, a.breed as breed, a.age as age, a.health_status as healthStatus, a.is_adoptable as isAdoptable, a.created_at as createdAt, a.animal_photo as animalPhoto from animal a LEFT JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s on s.shelter_id = a.shelter_id WHERE a.shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND a.is_adoptable != -1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS animalTotalNum FROM strayanimalrescue.animal WHERE is_adoptable != -1
